user_message: Can you work with me on partner engagement for Evergreen Solutions? We had a deep-dive last month -- need the follow-up.

Just checking in on the partner engagement proposal. Our IT Director is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Evergreen Solutions: the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF42-F trap (Invents customer interest beyond what email signaled); produces complete Signal assessment, opportunity hypothesis with confidence, ownership routing, response draft, next-s
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF42-F failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF42-F failure mode (Invents customer interest beyond what email signaled)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct partner engagement decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF42-F -- Invents customer interest beyond what email signaled
